_fixture_note: DEMO DUAL-CONTROL FIXTURE (issue #58). Banking scenario where the USER must APPROVE a high-value wire mid-flow before the agent can complete it. The agent sends an approval request (request_wire_approval); the user, via their OWN user_tool (approve_pending_request), approves it on the next turn — both acting on the same shared world. The agent must WAIT for the approval it does not control, then complete the wire. NOT part of the evaluated corpus — lives in tests/fixtures, never in data/scenarios. Demonstrates the dual-control MECHANISM only.

persona.name: Margaret Chen
persona.background: Runs a catering business. Has both personal and business accounts. Expects to confirm large movements of money herself before they go through.

user_goals: Check the current balance of her business checking account
Send a $9,000 wire transfer to a vendor, Coastal Supply Co, for an equipment order
Confirm the wire was sent after she approves it

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account

tools.name: request_wire_approval
tools.description: Send a high-value wire to the customer for explicit approval before it can be executed. Returns a pending request the customer must approve on their own device.

tools.name: execute_wire_transfer
tools.description: Execute a wire transfer that has already been approved by the customer. Fails if the matching pending request is not approved.

initial_message: Hi, I need to send a wire to a vendor today, but it's a big one so I'll want to approve it myself before it goes out.

expected_state_changes.goal: Send a $9,000 wire transfer to a vendor, Coastal Supply Co, for an equipment order
Confirm the wire was sent after she approves it

user_tools.name: approve_pending_request
user_tools.description: Customer-side action: approve a pending high-value request (e.g. a wire) on their own device.

user_actions.user_message: Okay, I see the approval prompt on my phone — I just approved the $9,000 wire to Coastal Supply Co on my end. Go ahead and send it.
